message:
fix(git): use RemoteDefaultBranch() instead of hardcoded 'main' in BranchCreatedDate

BranchCreatedDate() hardcoded 'main' as the base branch for merge-base
calculation, causing incorrect results for repos using 'master' or other
default branch names. Now uses RemoteDefaultBranch() to detect the actual
default branch.

Fixes: gt-06ert

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
